15	"""Bazel functions for VCS."""
16	
17	load("@rules_hdl//verilog:providers.bzl", "VerilogInfo")
18	load("@coralnpu_hw//rules:verilog.bzl", "collect_verilog_files")
19	
20	def _vcs_testbench_test_impl(ctx):
21	    all_files = collect_verilog_files(ctx.attr.deps).to_list()
22	
23	    vcs_binary_output = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.module)
24	    vcs_daidir_output = ctx.actions.declare_directory(
25	        ctx.attr.module + ".daidir")
26	
27	    verilog_files = []
28	    for file in all_files:
29	        if file.extension in ["dat", "mem"]:
30	            continue
31	        verilog_files.append(file)
32	
33	    command = [
34	        "vcs",
35	        "-full64",
36	        "-sverilog",
37	    ]
38	    verilog_dirs = dict()
39	    for file in verilog_files:
40	        verilog_dirs[file.dirname] = None
41	    for verilog_file in verilog_files:
42	        command.append(verilog_file.path)
43	    command.append("-o")
44	    command.append(vcs_binary_output.path)
45	
46	    ctx.actions.run_shell(
47	        outputs=[vcs_binary_output, vcs_daidir_output],
48	        inputs=verilog_files,
49	        command = " ".join(command),
50	        use_default_shell_env = True,
51	    )
52	
53	    return [DefaultInfo(runfiles=ctx.runfiles(files=[vcs_daidir_output]),
54	                        executable=vcs_binary_output)]
55	
56	_vcs_testbench_test = rule(
57	    _vcs_testbench_test_impl,
58	    attrs = {
59	        "srcs": attr.label_list(allow_files = True),
60	        "deps": attr.label(
61	            doc = "The verilog target to create a test bench for.",
62	            providers = [VerilogInfo],
63	            mandatory = True,
64	        ),
65	        "module": attr.string(
66	            doc = "The name of the verilog module to verilate.",
67	            mandatory = True,
68	        ),
69	    },
70	    test = True,
71	)
72	
73	def vcs_testbench_test(name, tags=[], **kwargs):
74	    _vcs_testbench_test(name = name, tags = ["vcs"] + tags, **kwargs)
75	
76	
77	
78	def _vcs_binary_impl(ctx):
79	    verilog_files = collect_verilog_files(ctx.attr.verilog_deps, ctx.files.verilog_srcs).to_list()
80	
81	    libs = []
82	    objects = []
83	    cflags = []
84	    headers_depsets = []
85	
86	    for dep in ctx.attr.deps:
87	        # 1. Gather include paths and headers depset
88	        compilation_context = dep[CcInfo].compilation_context
89	        headers_depsets.append(compilation_context.headers)
90	        for include in compilation_context.quote_includes.to_list():
91	            cflags += ["-cflags", "-I" + include]
92	        for include in compilation_context.system_includes.to_list():
93	            cflags += ["-cflags", "-I" + include]
94	
95	        # 2. Gather static libraries and object files
96	        transitive_linker_inputs = depset([], transitive = [dep[CcInfo].linking_context.linker_inputs])
97	        for link in transitive_linker_inputs.to_list():
98	            for library in link.libraries:
99	                if library.pic_static_library:
100	                    libs.append(library.pic_static_library)
101	                elif library.static_library:
102	                    libs.append(library.static_library)
103	                if library.pic_objects:
104	                    for obj in library.pic_objects:
105	                        objects.append(obj)
106	                elif library.objects:
107	                    for obj in library.objects:
108	                        objects.append(obj)
109	
110	    vcs_binary_output = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.name)
111	    vcs_simv_output = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.name + "_simv")
112	    vcs_daidir_output = ctx.actions.declare_directory(ctx.attr.name + "_simv.daidir")
113	
114	    script = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.name + "_vcs_link.sh")
115	
116	    script_content = [
117	        "#!/bin/bash",
118	        "set -e",
119	        "mkdir -p stripped_libs",
120	    ]
121	
122	    stripped_libs = []
123	    for lib in libs:
124	        stripped_path = "stripped_libs/" + lib.basename
125	        script_content.append("cp -f %s %s" % (lib.path, stripped_path))
126	        script_content.append("chmod +w %s" % stripped_path)
127	        script_content.append("objcopy --remove-section=.sframe %s" % stripped_path)
128	        stripped_libs.append(stripped_path)
129	
130	    stripped_objects = []
131	    for obj in objects:
132	        stripped_path = "stripped_libs/" + obj.basename
133	        script_content.append("cp -f %s %s" % (obj.path, stripped_path))
134	        script_content.append("chmod +w %s" % stripped_path)
135	        script_content.append("objcopy --remove-section=.sframe %s" % stripped_path)
136	        stripped_objects.append(stripped_path)
137	
138	    vcs_command = [
139	        "vcs",
140	        "-full64",
141	        "-sverilog",
142	        "-q",
143	        "-kdb",
144	        "+vcs+fsdbon",
145	        "+define+VCS",
146	        "-debug_access+all",
147	        "+notimingcheck",
148	        "-timescale=1ns/1ps",
149	        "-cflags", "-I..",
150	        "-o", vcs_simv_output.path,
151	    ] + cflags + ctx.attr.build_args
152	
153	    package_files = []
154	    other_files = []
155	    for file in verilog_files:
156	        if file.basename.endswith("pkg.sv") or file.basename.endswith("Pkg.sv") or file.basename.startswith("defs_"):
157	            package_files.append(file)
158	        else:
159	            other_files.append(file)
160	    sorted_verilog_files = package_files + other_files
161	
162	    for file in sorted_verilog_files:
163	        vcs_command.append(file.path)
164	
165	    for file in ctx.files.srcs:
166	        vcs_command.append(file.path)
167	
168	    for lib_path in stripped_libs:
169	        vcs_command.append(lib_path)
170	
171	    for obj_path in stripped_objects:
172	        vcs_command.append(obj_path)
173	
174	    script_content.append(" ".join(vcs_command))
175	
176	    ctx.actions.write(script, "\n".join(script_content), is_executable = True)
177	
178	    # Generate user-facing runner script!
179	    runner_content = [
180	        "#!/bin/bash",
181	        'SIMV_ARGS=("-q" "-suppress=ASLR_DETECTED_INFO" "-no_save")',
182	        'for arg in "$@"; do',
183	        '  if [[ "$arg" == --binary=* ]]; then',
184	        '    val="${arg#*=}"',
185	        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("+binary=$val")',
186	        '  elif [[ "$arg" == --cycles=* ]]; then',
187	        '    val="${arg#*=}"',
188	        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("+cycles=$val")',
189	        '  elif [[ "$arg" == --trace ]]; then',
190	        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("+trace")',
191	        '  else',
192	        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("$arg")',
193	        '  fi',
194	        'done',
195	        'RUNNER_DIR=$(dirname "$0")',
196	        '# Filter out Synopsys noise!',
197	        '"$RUNNER_DIR/%s_simv" "${SIMV_ARGS[@]}" 2>&1 | grep -v -E \\' % ctx.attr.name,
198	        '  -e "^Chronologic VCS simulator" \\',
199	        '  -e "^Contains Synopsys proprietary" \\',
200	        '  -e "^Compiler version" \\',
201	        '  -e "^Notice: timing checks" \\',
202	        '  -e "^\\*Verdi\\*" \\',

file.content:
# Copyright 2024 Google LLC
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

"""Bazel functions for VCS."""

load("@rules_hdl//verilog:providers.bzl", "VerilogInfo")
load("@coralnpu_hw//rules:verilog.bzl", "collect_verilog_files")

def _vcs_testbench_test_impl(ctx):
    all_files = collect_verilog_files(ctx.attr.deps).to_list()

    vcs_binary_output = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.module)
    vcs_daidir_output = ctx.actions.declare_directory(
        ctx.attr.module + ".daidir")

    verilog_files = []
    for file in all_files:
        if file.extension in ["dat", "mem"]:
            continue
        verilog_files.append(file)

    command = [
        "vcs",
        "-full64",
        "-sverilog",
    ]
    verilog_dirs = dict()
    for file in verilog_files:
        verilog_dirs[file.dirname] = None
    for verilog_file in verilog_files:
        command.append(verilog_file.path)
    command.append("-o")
    command.append(vcs_binary_output.path)

    ctx.actions.run_shell(
        outputs=[vcs_binary_output, vcs_daidir_output],
        inputs=verilog_files,
        command = " ".join(command),
        use_default_shell_env = True,
    )

    return [DefaultInfo(runfiles=ctx.runfiles(files=[vcs_daidir_output]),
                        executable=vcs_binary_output)]

_vcs_testbench_test = rule(
    _vcs_testbench_test_impl,
    attrs = {
        "srcs": attr.label_list(allow_files = True),
        "deps": attr.label(
            doc = "The verilog target to create a test bench for.",
            providers = [VerilogInfo],
            mandatory = True,
        ),
        "module": attr.string(
            doc = "The name of the verilog module to verilate.",
            mandatory = True,
        ),
    },
    test = True,
)

def vcs_testbench_test(name, tags=[], **kwargs):
    _vcs_testbench_test(name = name, tags = ["vcs"] + tags, **kwargs)



def _vcs_binary_impl(ctx):
    verilog_files = collect_verilog_files(ctx.attr.verilog_deps, ctx.files.verilog_srcs).to_list()

    libs = []
    objects = []
    cflags = []
    headers_depsets = []

    for dep in ctx.attr.deps:
        # 1. Gather include paths and headers depset
        compilation_context = dep[CcInfo].compilation_context
        headers_depsets.append(compilation_context.headers)
        for include in compilation_context.quote_includes.to_list():
            cflags += ["-cflags", "-I" + include]
        for include in compilation_context.system_includes.to_list():
            cflags += ["-cflags", "-I" + include]

        # 2. Gather static libraries and object files
        transitive_linker_inputs = depset([], transitive = [dep[CcInfo].linking_context.linker_inputs])
        for link in transitive_linker_inputs.to_list():
            for library in link.libraries:
                if library.pic_static_library:
                    libs.append(library.pic_static_library)
                elif library.static_library:
                    libs.append(library.static_library)
                if library.pic_objects:
                    for obj in library.pic_objects:
                        objects.append(obj)
                elif library.objects:
                    for obj in library.objects:
                        objects.append(obj)

    vcs_binary_output = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.name)
    vcs_simv_output = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.name + "_simv")
    vcs_daidir_output = ctx.actions.declare_directory(ctx.attr.name + "_simv.daidir")

    script = ctx.actions.declare_file(ctx.attr.name + "_vcs_link.sh")

    script_content = [
        "#!/bin/bash",
        "set -e",
        "mkdir -p stripped_libs",
    ]

    stripped_libs = []
    for lib in libs:
        stripped_path = "stripped_libs/" + lib.basename
        script_content.append("cp -f %s %s" % (lib.path, stripped_path))
        script_content.append("chmod +w %s" % stripped_path)
        script_content.append("objcopy --remove-section=.sframe %s" % stripped_path)
        stripped_libs.append(stripped_path)

    stripped_objects = []
    for obj in objects:
        stripped_path = "stripped_libs/" + obj.basename
        script_content.append("cp -f %s %s" % (obj.path, stripped_path))
        script_content.append("chmod +w %s" % stripped_path)
        script_content.append("objcopy --remove-section=.sframe %s" % stripped_path)
        stripped_objects.append(stripped_path)

    vcs_command = [
        "vcs",
        "-full64",
        "-sverilog",
        "-q",
        "-kdb",
        "+vcs+fsdbon",
        "+define+VCS",
        "-debug_access+all",
        "+notimingcheck",
        "-timescale=1ns/1ps",
        "-cflags", "-I..",
        "-o", vcs_simv_output.path,
    ] + cflags + ctx.attr.build_args

    package_files = []
    other_files = []
    for file in verilog_files:
        if file.basename.endswith("pkg.sv") or file.basename.endswith("Pkg.sv") or file.basename.startswith("defs_"):
            package_files.append(file)
        else:
            other_files.append(file)
    sorted_verilog_files = package_files + other_files

    for file in sorted_verilog_files:
        vcs_command.append(file.path)

    for file in ctx.files.srcs:
        vcs_command.append(file.path)

    for lib_path in stripped_libs:
        vcs_command.append(lib_path)

    for obj_path in stripped_objects:
        vcs_command.append(obj_path)

    script_content.append(" ".join(vcs_command))

    ctx.actions.write(script, "\n".join(script_content), is_executable = True)

    # Generate user-facing runner script!
    runner_content = [
        "#!/bin/bash",
        'SIMV_ARGS=("-q" "-suppress=ASLR_DETECTED_INFO" "-no_save")',
        'for arg in "$@"; do',
        '  if [[ "$arg" == --binary=* ]]; then',
        '    val="${arg#*=}"',
        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("+binary=$val")',
        '  elif [[ "$arg" == --cycles=* ]]; then',
        '    val="${arg#*=}"',
        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("+cycles=$val")',
        '  elif [[ "$arg" == --trace ]]; then',
        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("+trace")',
        '  else',
        '    SIMV_ARGS+=("$arg")',
        '  fi',
        'done',
        'RUNNER_DIR=$(dirname "$0")',
        '# Filter out Synopsys noise!',
        '"$RUNNER_DIR/%s_simv" "${SIMV_ARGS[@]}" 2>&1 | grep -v -E \\' % ctx.attr.name,
        '  -e "^Chronologic VCS simulator" \\',
        '  -e "^Contains Synopsys proprietary" \\',
        '  -e "^Compiler version" \\',
        '  -e "^Notice: timing checks" \\',
        '  -e "^\\*Verdi\\*" \\',
        '  -e "^FSDB Dumper for VCS" \\',
        '  -e "^\\(C\\) 1996" \\',
        '  -e "^Time: 0 ps" \\',
        '  -e "^CPU Time:" \\',
        '  -e "^[A-Za-z]{3} [A-Za-z]{3} [ 0-9]{2}" \\',
        '  -e "^           V C S   S i m u l a t i o n" || true',
    ]
    ctx.actions.write(vcs_binary_output, "\n".join(runner_content), is_executable = True)

    headers_depset = depset([], transitive = headers_depsets)
    ctx.actions.run(
        inputs = depset(verilog_files + ctx.files.srcs + libs + objects, transitive = [headers_depset]),
        outputs = [vcs_simv_output, vcs_daidir_output],
        executable = script,
        use_default_shell_env = True,
        progress_message = "[VCS Link] Linking %s" % ctx.label,
    )

    return [DefaultInfo(
        files=depset([vcs_binary_output]),
        runfiles=ctx.runfiles(files=[vcs_simv_output, vcs_daidir_output]),
        executable=vcs_binary_output,
    )]

_vcs_binary = rule(
    _vcs_binary_impl,
    attrs = {
        "verilog_srcs": attr.label_list(allow_files = True),
        "srcs": attr.label_list(allow_files = True),
        "verilog_deps": attr.label_list(
            doc = "Verilog library dependencies",
            providers = [VerilogInfo],
        ),
        "deps": attr.label_list(
            doc = "C++ static library dependencies",
            providers = [CcInfo],
        ),
        "build_args": attr.string_list(allow_empty = True),
        "_cc_toolchain": attr.label(
            doc = "CC compiler.",
            default = Label("@bazel_tools//tools/cpp:current_cc_toolchain"),
        ),
    },
    toolchains = [
        "@bazel_tools//tools/cpp:toolchain_type",
    ],
    executable = True,
)

def vcs_binary(name, tags=[], **kwargs):
    _vcs_binary(name = name, tags = ["vcs"] + tags, **kwargs)

1	# CoralNPU UVM Testbench
2	
3	This document describes the structure and usage of the UVM testbench for
4	verifying the `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` DUT.
5	
6	## Overview
7	
8	This testbench provides a basic UVM environment to:
9	* Instantiate the `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` DUT.
10	* Connect AXI Master, AXI Slave, and IRQ interfaces to the DUT.
11	* Provide basic stimulus generation via UVM sequences.
12	* Include a simple reactive AXI Slave model.
13	* Load a binary file into the DUT's memory using backdoor access.
14	* Kick off the DUT execution using initial AXI writes.
15	* Check for basic test completion via DUT status signals (`halted`, `fault`) or
16	  a timeout.
17	
18	## Prerequisites
19	
20	* **Synopsys VCS:** This testbench is configured to run with Synopsys VCS.
21	* **UVM:** VCS needs to be configured with UVM 1.2 support enabled.
22	* **CoralNPU Hardware Repository:** Access to the repository containing the
23	  `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` source code is required to generate the DUT
24	  Verilog and the test binary.
25	* **Bazel:** The build system used to generate the Verilog from the Chisel
26	  source in the CoralNPU HW repository.
27	* **RISC-V Toolchain:** A RISC-V toolchain compatible with the CoralNPU
28	  project is needed to generate the `.elf` file.
29	* **CoralNPU MPACT Repository:** Set the `CORALNPU_MPACT` environment
30	  variable to the absolute path of the `coralnpu-mpact` repository. This
31	  is required for co-simulation.
32	
33	## Generating the Test Binary (program.elf)
34	
35	The test program run by the DUT needs to be compiled to an elf format.
36	
37	1.  Navigate to the CoralNPU HW repository root:
38	    ```bash
39	    cd /path/to/your/coralnpu/hw/repo
40	    ```
41	2.  Run the Bazel build command to compile the test program:
42	    ```bash
43	    bazel build //tests/cocotb/tutorial:coralnpu_v2_program
44	    ```
45	3.  The `coralnpu_v2_program.elf` file is generated in the bazel output
46	    directory.
47	4.  Copy this `coralnpu_v2_program.elf` file to the `bin/` directory of this
48	    UVM testbench structure (or update the `TEST_ELF` path in the `Makefile` or
49	    run command).
50	
51	## Directory Structure
52	
53	The testbench follows a standard UVM directory structure:
54	
55	```
56	.
57	├── common/                  # Common components
58	│   ├── coralnpu_axi_master/ # Files related to the TB acting as AXI Master
59	│   │   ├── coralnpu_axi_master_if.sv
60	│   │   └── coralnpu_axi_master_agent_pkg.sv
61	│   ├── coralnpu_axi_slave/  # Files related to the TB acting as AXI Slave
62	│   │   ├── coralnpu_axi_slave_if.sv
63	│   │   └── coralnpu_axi_slave_agent_pkg.sv
64	│   ├── coralnpu_irq/        # Files related to the IRQ/Control interface
65	│   │   ├── coralnpu_irq_if.sv
66	│   │   └── coralnpu_irq_agent_pkg.sv
67	│   └── transaction_item/    # Transaction item definitions
68	│       └── transaction_item_pkg.sv
69	├── env/                     # UVM Environment definition
70	│   └── coralnpu_env_pkg.sv
71	├── tb/                      # Top-level testbench module
72	│   └── coralnpu_tb_top.sv
73	├── tests/                   # UVM Tests and Sequences
74	│   └── coralnpu_test_pkg.sv
75	├── Makefile                 # Makefile for compilation and simulation
76	├── coralnpu_dv.f            # File list for compilation
77	└── bin/                     # Directory for test binaries
78	    └── program.elf          # (Needs to be generated and copied here)
79	```
80	
81	## Running the Testbench using the Makefile
82	
83	The provided `Makefile` simplifies the compilation and simulation process.
84	
85	**1. Compiling the Simulator Executable:**
86	
87	* **Command:** `make compile`
88	* **Action:**
89	    * Creates necessary directories (`sim_work`, `logs`, `waves`).
90	    * Generates the DUT Verilog from Chisel sources.
91	    * Builds the MPACT co-simulation C++ library.
92	    * Compiles the DUT and testbench SystemVerilog files using VCS based on `coralnpu_dv.f`.
93	    * Creates the `sim_work/simv` executable.
94	*   Users should run `make compile` whenever modifying SystemVerilog (`.sv`),
95	    Chisel (`.scala`), or C++ (`.cpp`) source files that are part of the
96	    DUT or testbench.
97	* **Expected Output:**
98	    ```
99	    --- Checking MPACT-Sim Co-sim Library dependencies ---
100	    --- Checking RTL source dependencies ---
101	    --- Compiling with VCS ---
102	    Chronologic VCS simulator copyright 1991-202X
103	    Contains Synopsys proprietary information.
104	    Compiler version ...
105	    ... (VCS compilation messages) ...
106	    Top Level Modules:
107	            coralnpu_tb_top
108	    TimeScale is 1ns / 1ps
109	    --- Compilation Finished ---
110	    ```
111	    Check `sim_work/logs/compile.log` for detailed messages and errors.
112	
113	**2. Running the Simulation:**
114	
115	* **Command (Default Test):** `make run`
116	    * Runs the default test (`coralnpu_base_test`) defined in the Makefile.
117	    * Uses the default program (`bin/program.elf`).
118	    * Uses `UVM_MEDIUM` verbosity.
119	* **Command (Specific Test & Binary):**
120	    ```bash
121	    make run UVM_TESTNAME=<your_specific_test> \
122	             TEST_ELF=/path/to/another.elf \
123	             UVM_VERBOSITY=UVM_HIGH
124	    ```
125	    * Overrides the default test name, binary path, and verbosity level.
126	* **Action:**
127	  * Generates memory initialization files (`.mem`) and runtime options
128	    (`elf_run_opts.f`) from the specified `TEST_ELF` (this always runs).
129	  * Executes the *already compiled* `simv` executable with the specified UVM runtime options.
130	  * Users should run `make run` after `make compile` has successfully
131	    finished, or when only the `TEST_ELF` file changes and recompilation
132	    is not needed.
133	* **Expected Output:**
134	    ```
135	    --- Running Simulation ---
136	    Test:      coralnpu_base_test
137	    ELF File:  ./bin/program.elf
138	    Verbosity: UVM_MEDIUM
139	    Timeout:   20000 ns
140	    Plusargs:  +UVM_TESTNAME=coralnpu_base_test +UVM_VERBOSITY=UVM_MEDIUM \
141	               +TEST_TIMEOUT=20000 +TEST_ELF=./bin/program.elf
142	    Log File:  ./sim_work/logs/coralnpu_base_test.log
143	    Wave File: ./sim_work/waves/coralnpu_base_test.fsdb
144	    Chronologic VCS simulator copyright 1991-202X
145	    Contains Synopsys proprietary information.
146	    Simulator version ... ; Runtime version ...
147	    UVM_INFO @ 0: reporter [RNTST] Running test coralnpu_base_test...
148	    ... (UVM simulation messages based on verbosity) ...
149	    UVM_INFO ./tests/coralnpu_test_pkg.sv(LINE#) @ TIME: uvm_test_top \
150	        [coralnpu_base_test] Run phase finishing
151	    UVM_INFO ./tests/coralnpu_test_pkg.sv(LINE#) @ TIME: uvm_test_top \
152	        [coralnpu_base_test] Test ended on DUT halt.
153	    --- UVM Report Summary ---
154	    ...
155	    UVM_INFO ./tests/coralnpu_test_pkg.sv(241) @ TIME: uvm_test_top \
156	        [coralnpu_base_test] ** UVM TEST PASSED **
157	    --- Simulation Finished ---
158	    ```
159	    * Look for the `** UVM TEST PASSED **` or `** UVM TEST FAILED **` message
160	      at the end of the simulation log (`sim_work/logs/<testname>.log`).
161	    * If enabled, a waveform file (`sim_work/waves/<testname>.fsdb`) will be
162	      generated.
163	
164	**3. Combined Compile and Run:**
165	
166	* **Command:** `make all` (or simply `make`)
167	* **Action:** This command first runs `make compile` to ensure the simulator
168	  executable is up-to-date, then runs `make run`. This is a convenient
169	  way to perform a full build and run.
170	
171	**4. Cleaning:**
172	
173	* **Command:** `make clean`
174	* **Action:** Removes the `sim_work` directory and other simulation-generated
175	  files (`simv`, `csrc`, logs, waveforms, etc.). It also cleans Bazel
176	  caches for the MPACT library and generated RTL.
177	* **Expected Output:**
178	    ```
179	    --- Cleaning Simulation Files ---
180	    rm -rf sim_work simv* csrc* *.log* *.key *.vpd *.fsdb ucli.key DVEfiles/ \
181	           verdiLog/ novas.*
182	    --- Cleaning MPACT-Sim Bazel cache ---
183	    ... (Bazel clean messages) ...
184	    ```
185	
186	This README should help you get started with compiling and running the basic
187	test for the `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` DUT.

# CoralNPU UVM Testbench

This document describes the structure and usage of the UVM testbench for
verifying the `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` DUT.

## Overview

This testbench provides a basic UVM environment to:
* Instantiate the `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` DUT.
* Connect AXI Master, AXI Slave, and IRQ interfaces to the DUT.
* Provide basic stimulus generation via UVM sequences.
* Include a simple reactive AXI Slave model.
* Load a binary file into the DUT's memory using backdoor access.
* Kick off the DUT execution using initial AXI writes.
* Check for basic test completion via DUT status signals (`halted`, `fault`) or
  a timeout.

## Prerequisites

* **Synopsys VCS:** This testbench is configured to run with Synopsys VCS.
* **UVM:** VCS needs to be configured with UVM 1.2 support enabled.
* **CoralNPU Hardware Repository:** Access to the repository containing the
  `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` source code is required to generate the DUT
  Verilog and the test binary.
* **Bazel:** The build system used to generate the Verilog from the Chisel
  source in the CoralNPU HW repository.
* **RISC-V Toolchain:** A RISC-V toolchain compatible with the CoralNPU
  project is needed to generate the `.elf` file.
* **CoralNPU MPACT Repository:** Set the `CORALNPU_MPACT` environment
  variable to the absolute path of the `coralnpu-mpact` repository. This
  is required for co-simulation.

## Generating the Test Binary (program.elf)

The test program run by the DUT needs to be compiled to an elf format.

1.  Navigate to the CoralNPU HW repository root:
    ```bash
    cd /path/to/your/coralnpu/hw/repo
    ```
2.  Run the Bazel build command to compile the test program:
    ```bash
    bazel build //tests/cocotb/tutorial:coralnpu_v2_program
    ```
3.  The `coralnpu_v2_program.elf` file is generated in the bazel output
    directory.
4.  Copy this `coralnpu_v2_program.elf` file to the `bin/` directory of this
    UVM testbench structure (or update the `TEST_ELF` path in the `Makefile` or
    run command).

## Directory Structure

The testbench follows a standard UVM directory structure:

```
.
├── common/                  # Common components
│   ├── coralnpu_axi_master/ # Files related to the TB acting as AXI Master
│   │   ├── coralnpu_axi_master_if.sv
│   │   └── coralnpu_axi_master_agent_pkg.sv
│   ├── coralnpu_axi_slave/  # Files related to the TB acting as AXI Slave
│   │   ├── coralnpu_axi_slave_if.sv
│   │   └── coralnpu_axi_slave_agent_pkg.sv
│   ├── coralnpu_irq/        # Files related to the IRQ/Control interface
│   │   ├── coralnpu_irq_if.sv
│   │   └── coralnpu_irq_agent_pkg.sv
│   └── transaction_item/    # Transaction item definitions
│       └── transaction_item_pkg.sv
├── env/                     # UVM Environment definition
│   └── coralnpu_env_pkg.sv
├── tb/                      # Top-level testbench module
│   └── coralnpu_tb_top.sv
├── tests/                   # UVM Tests and Sequences
│   └── coralnpu_test_pkg.sv
├── Makefile                 # Makefile for compilation and simulation
├── coralnpu_dv.f            # File list for compilation
└── bin/                     # Directory for test binaries
    └── program.elf          # (Needs to be generated and copied here)
```

## Running the Testbench using the Makefile

The provided `Makefile` simplifies the compilation and simulation process.

**1. Compiling the Simulator Executable:**

* **Command:** `make compile`
* **Action:**
    * Creates necessary directories (`sim_work`, `logs`, `waves`).
    * Generates the DUT Verilog from Chisel sources.
    * Builds the MPACT co-simulation C++ library.
    * Compiles the DUT and testbench SystemVerilog files using VCS based on `coralnpu_dv.f`.
    * Creates the `sim_work/simv` executable.
*   Users should run `make compile` whenever modifying SystemVerilog (`.sv`),
    Chisel (`.scala`), or C++ (`.cpp`) source files that are part of the
    DUT or testbench.
* **Expected Output:**
    ```
    --- Checking MPACT-Sim Co-sim Library dependencies ---
    --- Checking RTL source dependencies ---
    --- Compiling with VCS ---
    Chronologic VCS simulator copyright 1991-202X
    Contains Synopsys proprietary information.
    Compiler version ...
    ... (VCS compilation messages) ...
    Top Level Modules:
            coralnpu_tb_top
    TimeScale is 1ns / 1ps
    --- Compilation Finished ---
    ```
    Check `sim_work/logs/compile.log` for detailed messages and errors.

**2. Running the Simulation:**

* **Command (Default Test):** `make run`
    * Runs the default test (`coralnpu_base_test`) defined in the Makefile.
    * Uses the default program (`bin/program.elf`).
    * Uses `UVM_MEDIUM` verbosity.
* **Command (Specific Test & Binary):**
    ```bash
    make run UVM_TESTNAME=<your_specific_test> \
             TEST_ELF=/path/to/another.elf \
             UVM_VERBOSITY=UVM_HIGH
    ```
    * Overrides the default test name, binary path, and verbosity level.
* **Action:**
  * Generates memory initialization files (`.mem`) and runtime options
    (`elf_run_opts.f`) from the specified `TEST_ELF` (this always runs).
  * Executes the *already compiled* `simv` executable with the specified UVM runtime options.
  * Users should run `make run` after `make compile` has successfully
    finished, or when only the `TEST_ELF` file changes and recompilation
    is not needed.
* **Expected Output:**
    ```
    --- Running Simulation ---
    Test:      coralnpu_base_test
    ELF File:  ./bin/program.elf
    Verbosity: UVM_MEDIUM
    Timeout:   20000 ns
    Plusargs:  +UVM_TESTNAME=coralnpu_base_test +UVM_VERBOSITY=UVM_MEDIUM \
               +TEST_TIMEOUT=20000 +TEST_ELF=./bin/program.elf
    Log File:  ./sim_work/logs/coralnpu_base_test.log
    Wave File: ./sim_work/waves/coralnpu_base_test.fsdb
    Chronologic VCS simulator copyright 1991-202X
    Contains Synopsys proprietary information.
    Simulator version ... ; Runtime version ...
    UVM_INFO @ 0: reporter [RNTST] Running test coralnpu_base_test...
    ... (UVM simulation messages based on verbosity) ...
    UVM_INFO ./tests/coralnpu_test_pkg.sv(LINE#) @ TIME: uvm_test_top \
        [coralnpu_base_test] Run phase finishing
    UVM_INFO ./tests/coralnpu_test_pkg.sv(LINE#) @ TIME: uvm_test_top \
        [coralnpu_base_test] Test ended on DUT halt.
    --- UVM Report Summary ---
    ...
    UVM_INFO ./tests/coralnpu_test_pkg.sv(241) @ TIME: uvm_test_top \
        [coralnpu_base_test] ** UVM TEST PASSED **
    --- Simulation Finished ---
    ```
    * Look for the `** UVM TEST PASSED **` or `** UVM TEST FAILED **` message
      at the end of the simulation log (`sim_work/logs/<testname>.log`).
    * If enabled, a waveform file (`sim_work/waves/<testname>.fsdb`) will be
      generated.

**3. Combined Compile and Run:**

* **Command:** `make all` (or simply `make`)
* **Action:** This command first runs `make compile` to ensure the simulator
  executable is up-to-date, then runs `make run`. This is a convenient
  way to perform a full build and run.

**4. Cleaning:**

* **Command:** `make clean`
* **Action:** Removes the `sim_work` directory and other simulation-generated
  files (`simv`, `csrc`, logs, waveforms, etc.). It also cleans Bazel
  caches for the MPACT library and generated RTL.
* **Expected Output:**
    ```
    --- Cleaning Simulation Files ---
    rm -rf sim_work simv* csrc* *.log* *.key *.vpd *.fsdb ucli.key DVEfiles/ \
           verdiLog/ novas.*
    --- Cleaning MPACT-Sim Bazel cache ---
    ... (Bazel clean messages) ...
    ```

This README should help you get started with compiling and running the basic
test for the `RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi` DUT.

1	# Copyright 2025 Google LLC
2	#
3	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
4	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
5	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
6	#
7	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
8	#
9	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
10	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
11	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
12	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
13	# limitations under the License.
14	
15	# Makefile for CoralNPU UVM Testbench (Integrates with MPACT-Sim)
16	
17	# If CORALNPU_MPACT is not set, dynamically resolve it from Bazel's http_archive cache
18	ifndef CORALNPU_MPACT
19	    BAZEL_CACHE_ARG = $(if $(BAZEL_CACHE),--repository_cache=$(BAZEL_CACHE),)
20	    _FETCH := $(shell bazel build $(BAZEL_CACHE_ARG) @coralnpu_mpact//:coralnpu_sim_users > /dev/null 2>&1)
21	    BAZEL_OUTPUT_BASE = $(shell bazel info output_base)
22	    CORALNPU_MPACT = $(BAZEL_OUTPUT_BASE)/external/coralnpu_mpact
23	endif
24	
25	# Generated RTL path
26	BAZEL_BIN_DIR = $(shell bazel info bazel-bin)
27	GENERATED_RTL_NAME = RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi.sv
28	GENERATED_RTL_SRC = $(BAZEL_BIN_DIR)/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/$(GENERATED_RTL_NAME)
29	
30	# User Configuration
31	VCS = vcs
32	VERILATOR ?= verilator
33	CXX = clang++
34	SIMULATOR ?= vcs
35	
36	# UVM DV Directories
37	COMMON_DIR = ./common
38	TB_DIR = ./tb
39	ENV_DIR = ./env
40	TESTS_DIR = ./tests
41	BIN_DIR = ./bin
42	UTILS_DIR = ./utils
43	
44	# Simulation Work Directory
45	SIM_DIR = ./sim_work
46	BUILD_DIR = $(SIM_DIR)/build
47	LOG_DIR = $(SIM_DIR)/logs
48	WAVE_DIR = $(SIM_DIR)/waves
49	
50	# MPACT-Sim Integration Paths
51	MPACT_BAZEL_BIN_DIR = $(CORALNPU_MPACT)/bazel-bin/sim/cosim
52	MPACT_COSIM_LIB_NAME = coralnpu_cosim_lib_static
53	MPACT_LIB_PATH = $(MPACT_BAZEL_BIN_DIR)/lib$(MPACT_COSIM_LIB_NAME).a
54	
55	# File List for -f option
56	FILE_LIST = ./coralnpu_dv.f
57	
58	# Simulation Settings
59	SIM_EXEC = $(SIM_DIR)/simv
60	UVM_TESTNAME ?= coralnpu_base_test
61	TEST_ELF ?= $(BIN_DIR)/rvv_aadd_int16_m1.elf
62	UVM_VERBOSITY ?= UVM_MEDIUM
63	TEST_TIMEOUT_NS ?= 100000
64	MISA_VALUE ?= "'h40201120'"
65	PLUSARGS = +UVM_TESTNAME=$(UVM_TESTNAME) \
66	           +UVM_VERBOSITY=$(UVM_VERBOSITY) +TEST_TIMEOUT=$(TEST_TIMEOUT_NS) \
67	           +TEST_ELF=$(TEST_ELF) \
68	           +MISA_VALUE=$(MISA_VALUE)
69	
70	# Waveform Dumping
71	ifeq ($(SIMULATOR),vcs)
72	DUMP_WAVES_FSDB = 1
73	WAVE_FILE = $(WAVE_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).fsdb
74	else
75	DUMP_WAVES_VCD = 1
76	WAVE_FILE = $(WAVE_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).vcd
77	endif
78	
79	# Compile options
80	ifeq ($(SIMULATOR),vcs)
81	SIM_COMPILE_OPTS = \
82		-full64 \
83		-sverilog \
84		+define+UVM_NO_DEPRECATED \
85		+define+TB_SUPPORT \
86			+define+VLEN_128 \
87			+define+ZVE32F_ON \
88		-ntb_opts uvm-1.2 \
89		-debug_access+all \
90		-kdb \
91		-timescale=1ns/1ps \
92		-o $(SIM_EXEC) \
93		-cpp $(CXX) \
94		-cppflags "-std=c++17" \
95		-CFLAGS "-I$(CORALNPU_MPACT)" \
96		$(MPACT_LIB_PATH)
97	else
98	SIM_COMPILE_OPTS = \
99		--binary \
100		--build-jobs $(shell nproc --all) \
101		--top coralnpu_tb_top \
102		-Wno-PINMISSING -Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-fatal \
103		--vpi \
104		--trace-vcd \
105		+define+UVM_NO_DEPRECATED \
106		+define+TB_SUPPORT \
107		+define+VLEN_128 \
108		+define+ZVE32F_ON \
109		+define+DUMP_WAVES_VCD \
110		--timescale 1ns/1ps \
111		-CFLAGS "-std=c++17 -I$(CORALNPU_MPACT)" \
112		-I"$(UVM)/src/" \
113		"$(UVM)/src/uvm_pkg.sv" \
114		"$(UVM)/src/dpi/uvm_dpi.cc" \
115		"$(MPACT_LIB_PATH)" \
116		-Mdir $(BUILD_DIR) \
117		-o simv
118	SIM_EXEC = $(BUILD_DIR)/simv
119	endif
120	
121	SIM_RUN_OPTS = \
122		$(PLUSARGS) \
123		$(EXTRA_PLUSARGS)
124	
125	# Add define to COMPILE options for waveform dumping
126	ifeq ($(DUMP_WAVES_FSDB),1)
127	SIM_COMPILE_OPTS += +define+DUMP_WAVES_FSDB
128	SIM_RUN_OPTS += +fsdb+all \
129	                +fsdbfile+$(WAVE_FILE)
130	endif
131	
132	# Add Spike Log to runtime options if defined
133	ifdef SPIKE_LOG
134	SIM_RUN_OPTS += +SPIKE_LOG=$(SPIKE_LOG)
135	endif
136	
137	# Bazel flags
138	ifdef CORALNPU_MPACT_RISCV
139	    BAZEL_OVERRIDE_FLAG = --override_repository=com_google_mpact-riscv=$(CORALNPU_MPACT_RISCV)
140	else
141	    BAZEL_OVERRIDE_FLAG =
142	endif
143	
144	MPACT_COMMIT ?= 430a8d1
145	
146	# Targets
147	
148	.PHONY: all compile run clean dirs help build_mpact_lib gen_mem_files rtl run_3way checkout_mpact
149	
150	# Default target, builds and then runs.
151	all: compile run
152	
153	# Checkout MPACT-Sim at a specific commit
154	checkout_mpact:
155		@echo "--- Checking out CORALNPU_MPACT at commit $(MPACT_COMMIT) ---"
156		cd $(CORALNPU_MPACT) && git fetch && git checkout $(MPACT_COMMIT)
157	
158	# Create necessary directories
159	dirs:
160		@mkdir -p $(SIM_DIR) $(LOG_DIR) $(WAVE_DIR) $(BIN_DIR)
161	
162	# Build the MPACT-Sim library using Bazel with CC=clang
163	build_mpact_lib:
164		@echo "--- Building MPACT-Sim Co-sim Library via Bazel ---"
165		cd $(CORALNPU_MPACT) && CC=clang bazel build $(BAZEL_OVERRIDE_FLAG) //sim/cosim:$(MPACT_COSIM_LIB_NAME)
166	
167	# Generate memory and run option files from the ELF file
168	# Generate the DUT RTL from Chisel source
169	rtl:
170		@echo "--- Generating DUT RTL from Chisel ---"
171		bazel build //hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu:rvv_core_mini_verification_axi_cc_library_emit_verilog
172	
173	# Compile the design
174	$(SIM_EXEC): $(FILE_LIST) dirs build_mpact_lib rtl
175		@echo "--- Compiling Simulation ---"
176		$(SIMULATOR) $(SIM_COMPILE_OPTS) -f $(FILE_LIST) $(GENERATED_RTL_SRC)
177		@echo "--- Compilation Finished ---"
178	
179	compile: $(SIM_EXEC)
180	
181	# Run the simulation
182	run:
183		@echo "--- Running Simulation ---"
184		@echo "Test:      $(UVM_TESTNAME)"
185		@echo "ELF File:  $(TEST_ELF)"
186		@echo "Verbosity: $(UVM_VERBOSITY)"
187		@echo "Timeout:   $(TEST_TIMEOUT_NS) ns"
188		@echo "Plusargs:  $(PLUSARGS)"
189		@echo "Log File:  $(LOG_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).log"
190	ifeq ($(DUMP_WAVES_FSDB),1)
191		@echo "Wave File: $(WAVE_FILE)"
192	endif
193		./$(SIM_EXEC) $(SIM_RUN_OPTS) -l $(LOG_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).log
194		@echo "--- Simulation Finished ---"
195	
196	# 3-Way Simulation
197	run_3way:
198		@echo "--- Running 3-Way Simulation (with Spike) ---"
199		$(MAKE) run SPIKE_LOG=$(if $(SPIKE_LOG),$(SPIKE_LOG),$(abspath spike.log))
200	
201	# Clean up simulation files
202	clean:
203		@echo "--- Cleaning Simulation Files ---"
204		rm -rf $(SIM_DIR) simv* csrc* *.log* *.key *.vpd *.fsdb ucli.key DVEfiles/ verdiLog/ novas.*
205		bazel clean --expunge
206		@echo "--- Cleaning MPACT-Sim Bazel cache ---"
207		cd $(CORALNPU_MPACT) && bazel clean --expunge
208	
209	# Help
210	help:
211		@echo "Makefile Targets:"
212		@echo "  make all              : Compiles and runs the default test (same as just 'make')."
213		@echo "  make compile          : Builds the simulator executable."
214		@echo "  make run              : Runs the simulation. Compiles first if the executable is missing or source files have changed."
215		@echo "                        :   Override defaults: make run UVM_TESTNAME=<test> TEST_ELF=<path> UVM_VERBOSITY=<level>"
216		@echo "  make run_3way         : Runs the simulation with 3-way check enabled (Spike)."
217		@echo "  make rtl              : Generates the DUT Verilog from Chisel source"
218		@echo "  make build_mpact_lib  : Only builds the MPACT-Sim C++ library"
219		@echo "  make checkout_mpact   : Checks out CORALNPU_MPACT at MPACT_COMMIT (default: $(MPACT_COMMIT))"
220		@echo "  make clean            : Removes generated simulation and MPACT-Sim files"
221		@echo "  make dirs             : Creates simulation directories"

file.content:
# Copyright 2025 Google LLC
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# Makefile for CoralNPU UVM Testbench (Integrates with MPACT-Sim)

# If CORALNPU_MPACT is not set, dynamically resolve it from Bazel's http_archive cache
ifndef CORALNPU_MPACT
    BAZEL_CACHE_ARG = $(if $(BAZEL_CACHE),--repository_cache=$(BAZEL_CACHE),)
    _FETCH := $(shell bazel build $(BAZEL_CACHE_ARG) @coralnpu_mpact//:coralnpu_sim_users > /dev/null 2>&1)
    BAZEL_OUTPUT_BASE = $(shell bazel info output_base)
    CORALNPU_MPACT = $(BAZEL_OUTPUT_BASE)/external/coralnpu_mpact
endif

# Generated RTL path
BAZEL_BIN_DIR = $(shell bazel info bazel-bin)
GENERATED_RTL_NAME = RvvCoreMiniVerificationAxi.sv
GENERATED_RTL_SRC = $(BAZEL_BIN_DIR)/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/$(GENERATED_RTL_NAME)

# User Configuration
VCS = vcs
VERILATOR ?= verilator
CXX = clang++
SIMULATOR ?= vcs

# UVM DV Directories
COMMON_DIR = ./common
TB_DIR = ./tb
ENV_DIR = ./env
TESTS_DIR = ./tests
BIN_DIR = ./bin
UTILS_DIR = ./utils

# Simulation Work Directory
SIM_DIR = ./sim_work
BUILD_DIR = $(SIM_DIR)/build
LOG_DIR = $(SIM_DIR)/logs
WAVE_DIR = $(SIM_DIR)/waves

# MPACT-Sim Integration Paths
MPACT_BAZEL_BIN_DIR = $(CORALNPU_MPACT)/bazel-bin/sim/cosim
MPACT_COSIM_LIB_NAME = coralnpu_cosim_lib_static
MPACT_LIB_PATH = $(MPACT_BAZEL_BIN_DIR)/lib$(MPACT_COSIM_LIB_NAME).a

# File List for -f option
FILE_LIST = ./coralnpu_dv.f

# Simulation Settings
SIM_EXEC = $(SIM_DIR)/simv
UVM_TESTNAME ?= coralnpu_base_test
TEST_ELF ?= $(BIN_DIR)/rvv_aadd_int16_m1.elf
UVM_VERBOSITY ?= UVM_MEDIUM
TEST_TIMEOUT_NS ?= 100000
MISA_VALUE ?= "'h40201120'"
PLUSARGS = +UVM_TESTNAME=$(UVM_TESTNAME) \
           +UVM_VERBOSITY=$(UVM_VERBOSITY) +TEST_TIMEOUT=$(TEST_TIMEOUT_NS) \
           +TEST_ELF=$(TEST_ELF) \
           +MISA_VALUE=$(MISA_VALUE)

# Waveform Dumping
ifeq ($(SIMULATOR),vcs)
DUMP_WAVES_FSDB = 1
WAVE_FILE = $(WAVE_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).fsdb
else
DUMP_WAVES_VCD = 1
WAVE_FILE = $(WAVE_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).vcd
endif

# Compile options
ifeq ($(SIMULATOR),vcs)
SIM_COMPILE_OPTS = \
	-full64 \
	-sverilog \
	+define+UVM_NO_DEPRECATED \
	+define+TB_SUPPORT \
		+define+VLEN_128 \
		+define+ZVE32F_ON \
	-ntb_opts uvm-1.2 \
	-debug_access+all \
	-kdb \
	-timescale=1ns/1ps \
	-o $(SIM_EXEC) \
	-cpp $(CXX) \
	-cppflags "-std=c++17" \
	-CFLAGS "-I$(CORALNPU_MPACT)" \
	$(MPACT_LIB_PATH)
else
SIM_COMPILE_OPTS = \
	--binary \
	--build-jobs $(shell nproc --all) \
	--top coralnpu_tb_top \
	-Wno-PINMISSING -Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-fatal \
	--vpi \
	--trace-vcd \
	+define+UVM_NO_DEPRECATED \
	+define+TB_SUPPORT \
	+define+VLEN_128 \
	+define+ZVE32F_ON \
	+define+DUMP_WAVES_VCD \
	--timescale 1ns/1ps \
	-CFLAGS "-std=c++17 -I$(CORALNPU_MPACT)" \
	-I"$(UVM)/src/" \
	"$(UVM)/src/uvm_pkg.sv" \
	"$(UVM)/src/dpi/uvm_dpi.cc" \
	"$(MPACT_LIB_PATH)" \
	-Mdir $(BUILD_DIR) \
	-o simv
SIM_EXEC = $(BUILD_DIR)/simv
endif

SIM_RUN_OPTS = \
	$(PLUSARGS) \
	$(EXTRA_PLUSARGS)

# Add define to COMPILE options for waveform dumping
ifeq ($(DUMP_WAVES_FSDB),1)
SIM_COMPILE_OPTS += +define+DUMP_WAVES_FSDB
SIM_RUN_OPTS += +fsdb+all \
                +fsdbfile+$(WAVE_FILE)
endif

# Add Spike Log to runtime options if defined
ifdef SPIKE_LOG
SIM_RUN_OPTS += +SPIKE_LOG=$(SPIKE_LOG)
endif

# Bazel flags
ifdef CORALNPU_MPACT_RISCV
    BAZEL_OVERRIDE_FLAG = --override_repository=com_google_mpact-riscv=$(CORALNPU_MPACT_RISCV)
else
    BAZEL_OVERRIDE_FLAG =
endif

MPACT_COMMIT ?= 430a8d1

# Targets

.PHONY: all compile run clean dirs help build_mpact_lib gen_mem_files rtl run_3way checkout_mpact

# Default target, builds and then runs.
all: compile run

# Checkout MPACT-Sim at a specific commit
checkout_mpact:
	@echo "--- Checking out CORALNPU_MPACT at commit $(MPACT_COMMIT) ---"
	cd $(CORALNPU_MPACT) && git fetch && git checkout $(MPACT_COMMIT)

# Create necessary directories
dirs:
	@mkdir -p $(SIM_DIR) $(LOG_DIR) $(WAVE_DIR) $(BIN_DIR)

# Build the MPACT-Sim library using Bazel with CC=clang
build_mpact_lib:
	@echo "--- Building MPACT-Sim Co-sim Library via Bazel ---"
	cd $(CORALNPU_MPACT) && CC=clang bazel build $(BAZEL_OVERRIDE_FLAG) //sim/cosim:$(MPACT_COSIM_LIB_NAME)

# Generate memory and run option files from the ELF file
# Generate the DUT RTL from Chisel source
rtl:
	@echo "--- Generating DUT RTL from Chisel ---"
	bazel build //hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu:rvv_core_mini_verification_axi_cc_library_emit_verilog

# Compile the design
$(SIM_EXEC): $(FILE_LIST) dirs build_mpact_lib rtl
	@echo "--- Compiling Simulation ---"
	$(SIMULATOR) $(SIM_COMPILE_OPTS) -f $(FILE_LIST) $(GENERATED_RTL_SRC)
	@echo "--- Compilation Finished ---"

compile: $(SIM_EXEC)

# Run the simulation
run:
	@echo "--- Running Simulation ---"
	@echo "Test:      $(UVM_TESTNAME)"
	@echo "ELF File:  $(TEST_ELF)"
	@echo "Verbosity: $(UVM_VERBOSITY)"
	@echo "Timeout:   $(TEST_TIMEOUT_NS) ns"
	@echo "Plusargs:  $(PLUSARGS)"
	@echo "Log File:  $(LOG_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).log"
ifeq ($(DUMP_WAVES_FSDB),1)
	@echo "Wave File: $(WAVE_FILE)"
endif
	./$(SIM_EXEC) $(SIM_RUN_OPTS) -l $(LOG_DIR)/$(UVM_TESTNAME).log
	@echo "--- Simulation Finished ---"

# 3-Way Simulation
run_3way:
	@echo "--- Running 3-Way Simulation (with Spike) ---"
	$(MAKE) run SPIKE_LOG=$(if $(SPIKE_LOG),$(SPIKE_LOG),$(abspath spike.log))

# Clean up simulation files
clean:
	@echo "--- Cleaning Simulation Files ---"
	rm -rf $(SIM_DIR) simv* csrc* *.log* *.key *.vpd *.fsdb ucli.key DVEfiles/ verdiLog/ novas.*
	bazel clean --expunge
	@echo "--- Cleaning MPACT-Sim Bazel cache ---"
	cd $(CORALNPU_MPACT) && bazel clean --expunge

# Help
help:
	@echo "Makefile Targets:"
	@echo "  make all              : Compiles and runs the default test (same as just 'make')."
	@echo "  make compile          : Builds the simulator executable."
	@echo "  make run              : Runs the simulation. Compiles first if the executable is missing or source files have changed."
	@echo "                        :   Override defaults: make run UVM_TESTNAME=<test> TEST_ELF=<path> UVM_VERBOSITY=<level>"
	@echo "  make run_3way         : Runs the simulation with 3-way check enabled (Spike)."
	@echo "  make rtl              : Generates the DUT Verilog from Chisel source"
	@echo "  make build_mpact_lib  : Only builds the MPACT-Sim C++ library"
	@echo "  make checkout_mpact   : Checks out CORALNPU_MPACT at MPACT_COMMIT (default: $(MPACT_COMMIT))"
	@echo "  make clean            : Removes generated simulation and MPACT-Sim files"
	@echo "  make dirs             : Creates simulation directories"
	@echo "  make help             : Shows this help message"

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/make  -f
2	
3	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
4	# Setting of project
5	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
6	RVV_WORKSPACE = $(shell pwd | sed 's/\(\S\+\)\/hdl\/verilog\/rvv/\1/')
7	scfg ?= rvv_backend
8	test ?= tb_debug_test
9	PROJECT_NAME = rvv_backend_tb
10	
11	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
12	# path & filelist
13	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
14	RVV_ROOT     = $(RVV_WORKSPACE)/hdl/verilog/rvv
15	DESIGN_PATH  = $(RVV_ROOT)/design
16	STD_PATH     = $(RVV_ROOT)/common
17	TB_PATH      = $(RVV_ROOT)/sve/$(PROJECT_NAME)
18	
19	RTLFILES = $(shell ls $(DESIGN_PATH)/rvv_backend*.sv)
20	RTLFILES += $(shell ls $(STD_PATH)/*.sv)
21	RTL_INC  = $(RVV_ROOT)/inc
22	
23	TBFILES = $(shell ls $(TB_PATH)/hdl/*.sv)
24	TB_INC  = $(TB_PATH)/include	\
25						$(TB_PATH)/src	\
26						$(TB_PATH)/env	\
27						$(TB_PATH)/tests	\
28						$(TB_PATH)/hdl
29	
30	RTL_INC := $(RTL_INC:%=+incdir+%)
31	TB_INC := $(TB_INC:%=+incdir+%)
32	
33	UNUSED = $(DESIGN_PATH)/Aligner.sv	\
34					$(DESIGN_PATH)/Aligner_tb.sv	\
35					$(DESIGN_PATH)/MultiFifo.sv	\
36					$(DESIGN_PATH)/MultiFifo_tb.sv	\
37					$(DESIGN_PATH)/rvv_backend_mul_unit.sv	\
38					$(DESIGN_PATH)/RvvBackend.sv
39	
40	UNUSED += $(STD_PATH)/fifo_flopped_2w2r.sv	\
41						$(STD_PATH)/fifo_flopped_4w2r.sv	\
42						$(STD_PATH)/openFifo8_flopped_2w2r.sv	\
43						$(STD_PATH)/openFifo4_flopped_ptr.sv
44						
45	
46	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
47	# scfg
48	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
49	RTL_DEFINE = 
50	TB_DEFINE = 
51	ifeq ($(filter $(scfg), rvv_backend	\
52													rvv_backend_bringup\
53	                       ), )
54	  scfg =  
55	endif
56	ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend)
57		RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
58		RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
59		RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_3_READ_PORT_6
60	endif
61	ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_i2rp4)
62		RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
63		RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
64		RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_2_READ_PORT_4
65	endif
66	ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_i2rp6)
67		RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
68		RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
69		RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_2_READ_PORT_6
70	endif
71	ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_i3rp6)
72		RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
73		RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
74		RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_3_READ_PORT_6
75	endif
76	ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_bringup)
77		RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_BRINGUP+TB_SUPPORT
78		RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
79		RTLFILES = $(DESIGN_PATH)/rvv_backend.sv
80	endif
81	
82	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
83	# VCS Options
84	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
85	DEFINES   = $(RTL_DEFINE) $(TB_DEFINE)
86	PLUS_ARGS ?= 
87	BUILD_OPTS =  
88	SIM_OPTS  =
89	UVM_TEST ?= $(test)
90	TB_TOP = rvv_backend_top
91	#Checking the VCS version
92	#VCS_VERSION = $(shell vcs -id > vcs_version ; grep "Compiler version" vcs_version | awk -F " " '{print $$5}')
93	#This variable contains all the UVM-1.0 supported VCS tool versions.
94	UVM10_SUPP_VCS_VERSNS = E-2011.03 
95	TIMESCALE = -override_timescale=1ns/1ps
96	UVM_VERBOSITY ?= UVM_LOW
97	SIM_TCL ?= $(TB_PATH)/dump_fsdb.tcl
98	# PARTCOMP = -partcomp -topcfg $(TB_PATH)/$(PROJECT_NAME)_topcfg.v
99	PARTCOMP =
100	timeout ?= "1000000000ns,no"
101	logdir ?= "outfiles"
102	
103	ifdef seed
104		SEED = +ntb_random_seed=$(seed)
105	else
106		SEED = +ntb_random_seed_automatic
107	endif
108	ifdef seed
109	TESTNAME   = $(UVM_TEST)$(atn)"."$(seed)
110	else
111	TESTNAME   = $(UVM_TEST)$(atn)
112	endif
113	ifeq ($(dump),on)
114	 	DUMP = -ucli -i $(SIM_TCL)
115	else
116		DUMP = 
117	endif
118	ifeq ($(coverage),on)
119		COV = -cm cond+line+branch+tgl -cm_dir $(COV_PATH) -cm_name $(TESTNAME)
120		DEFINES := $(filter-out +define+TB_SUPPORT, $(DEFINES))
121	else
122		COV = 
123	endif
124	ifeq ($(debug),on)
125		UVM_DEBUG_COMP =  -kdb -lca +UVM_VERDI_COMPWAVE
126		UVM_DEBUG_SIM = +UVM_VERDI_TRACE="UVM_AWARE+RAL+HIRE+COMPWAVE" +UVM_TR_RECORD -gui=verdi
127	else 
128		UVM_DEBUG_COMP = 
129		UVM_DEBUG_SIM = 
130	endif
131	atn ?=
132	max_error ?= 1
133	
134	ifdef VCS_HOME
135	 ifneq ($(VCS_VERSION),$(filter $(VCS_VERSION),$(UVM10_SUPP_VCS_VERSNS)))
136	  VCS_VERS_WARNING = 1
137	 endif  
138	 ifndef UVM_HOME
139	  UVM = -ntb_opts uvm 
140	 else
141	  UVM = -debug_pp +incdir+$(UVM_HOME)/src $(UVM_HOME)/src/uvm_pkg.sv ${UVM_HOME}/src/dpi/uvm_dpi.cc -CFLAGS -DVCS 
142	 endif
143	else
144	 ERR_STATUS = 1
145	endif
146	PLI_OPTS = -P ${NOVAS_HOME}/share/PLI/VCS/LINUX64/novas.tab ${NOVAS_HOME}/share/PLI/VCS/LINUX64/pli.a
147	
148	ASSERT_OPTS = -assert global_finish_maxfail=1		\
149								-assert set_error_action=display -assert set_error_action=count	\
150								-assert set_warning_action=display	\
151								-assert set_info_action=display	\
152								-assert quiet+quiet1+nopostproc
153	
154	ifeq ($(xprop_en), on)
155	VCOMP_XPROP_OPTS := -xprop=xmerge
156	VSIM_XPROP_OPTS  := -xprop=banner	
157	else
158	VCOMP_XPROP_OPTS := 
159	VSIM_XPROP_OPTS  := 
160	endif
161	
162	BUILD_PATH = $(RVV_ROOT)/build/$(scfg)
163	
164	SIM_PATH	 = $(RVV_ROOT)/$(logdir)/$(scfg)/$(TESTNAME)
165	COV_PATH   = $(RVV_ROOT)/$(logdir)/$(scfg)/
166	
167	#Compile command
168	VCOMP = vcs -full64 -sverilog +define+SV	\
169					+nospecify	\
170					+vcs+lic+wait	\
171					-deraceclockdata +notimingcheck	\
172					-debug_access+all	\
173					-assert enable_hier	\
174					$(TIMESCALE)	\
175					$(PLI_OPTS)	\
176					$(UVM)	\
177					$(COV)	\
178					$(UVM_DEBUG_COMP)	\
179					-Mupdate -Mdir=$(BUILD_PATH)/csrc	\
180					$(PARTCOMP)	\
181					$(VCOMP_XPROP_OPTS)	\
182					-f $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst -top $(TB_TOP)	\
183					-o $(BUILD_PATH)/simv	 
184	
185	
186	#Simulation command
187	VSIM  = $(BUILD_PATH)/simv	\
188					+vcs+lic+wait  \
189					$(ASSERT_OPTS)	\
190					$(SEED)	\
191					$(VSIM_XPROP_OPTS) \
192					$(PLUS_ARGS)	\
193					+UVM_TESTNAME=$(UVM_TEST) +UVM_VERBOSITY=$(UVM_VERBOSITY) \
194					$(DUMP) $(UVM_DEBUG_SIM)	\
195					+UVM_MAX_QUIT_COUNT=$(max_error),NO	\
196					+UVM_TIMEOUT=$(timeout)	\
197					$(COV)
198	
199	RTLFILES := $(filter-out $(UNUSED),$(RTLFILES))
200	
201	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
202	# CMDs
203	# ------------------------------------------------------------------
204	all default: vcs sim 
205	
206	vcs: vlst mkbuilddir
207		@cd $(BUILD_PATH); $(VCOMP) -l $(BUILD_PATH)/vcs.log 
208		@echo "Build log: $(BUILD_PATH)/vcs.log"
209	
210	sim_test:
211		@cd $(SIM_PATH); $(VSIM) -l $(SIM_PATH)/test.log
212		@echo "Test log: $(SIM_PATH)/test.log"
213	
214	chk_test:
215		@echo "checking test result......"
216		@$(RVV_ROOT)/com/check_test.pl check $(UVM_TEST) $(SIM_PATH)/test.log 
217	
218	cleanup_log:
219		@echo "cleaning up test log......"
220		@$(RVV_ROOT)/com/check_test.pl clean $(UVM_TEST) $(SIM_PATH)/tb_asm_dump.log
221	
222	sim: mksimdir sim_test chk_test cleanup_log
223		@echo "finised simulation......"
224	
225	mkbuilddir:
226		@echo "making build dir for scfg: $(scfg)"
227		# @rm -rf $(BUILD_PATH)
228		@mkdir -p $(BUILD_PATH)
229	
230	mksimdir:
231		@echo "creating test simulation dir for test: $(UVM_TEST)"
232		@mkdir -p $(SIM_PATH)
233		@cp $(scfg).vlst $(SIM_PATH)
234	
235	list vlst:
236		@echo "creating vlst for $(scfg)..."
237		@rm -rf $(scfg).vlst
238		@echo "$(RTL_INC)" > $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
239		@echo "$(TB_INC)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
240		@echo "$(DEFINES)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
241		@echo "$(RTLFILES)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
242		@echo "$(TBFILES)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/make  -f

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Setting of project
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
RVV_WORKSPACE = $(shell pwd | sed 's/\(\S\+\)\/hdl\/verilog\/rvv/\1/')
scfg ?= rvv_backend
test ?= tb_debug_test
PROJECT_NAME = rvv_backend_tb

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# path & filelist
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
RVV_ROOT     = $(RVV_WORKSPACE)/hdl/verilog/rvv
DESIGN_PATH  = $(RVV_ROOT)/design
STD_PATH     = $(RVV_ROOT)/common
TB_PATH      = $(RVV_ROOT)/sve/$(PROJECT_NAME)

RTLFILES = $(shell ls $(DESIGN_PATH)/rvv_backend*.sv)
RTLFILES += $(shell ls $(STD_PATH)/*.sv)
RTL_INC  = $(RVV_ROOT)/inc

TBFILES = $(shell ls $(TB_PATH)/hdl/*.sv)
TB_INC  = $(TB_PATH)/include	\
					$(TB_PATH)/src	\
					$(TB_PATH)/env	\
					$(TB_PATH)/tests	\
					$(TB_PATH)/hdl

RTL_INC := $(RTL_INC:%=+incdir+%)
TB_INC := $(TB_INC:%=+incdir+%)

UNUSED = $(DESIGN_PATH)/Aligner.sv	\
				$(DESIGN_PATH)/Aligner_tb.sv	\
				$(DESIGN_PATH)/MultiFifo.sv	\
				$(DESIGN_PATH)/MultiFifo_tb.sv	\
				$(DESIGN_PATH)/rvv_backend_mul_unit.sv	\
				$(DESIGN_PATH)/RvvBackend.sv

UNUSED += $(STD_PATH)/fifo_flopped_2w2r.sv	\
					$(STD_PATH)/fifo_flopped_4w2r.sv	\
					$(STD_PATH)/openFifo8_flopped_2w2r.sv	\
					$(STD_PATH)/openFifo4_flopped_ptr.sv
					

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# scfg
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
RTL_DEFINE = 
TB_DEFINE = 
ifeq ($(filter $(scfg), rvv_backend	\
												rvv_backend_bringup\
                       ), )
  scfg =  
endif
ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend)
	RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_3_READ_PORT_6
endif
ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_i2rp4)
	RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_2_READ_PORT_4
endif
ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_i2rp6)
	RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_2_READ_PORT_6
endif
ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_i3rp6)
	RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_SUPPORT
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+RVV_CONFIG_SVH +define+ISSUE_3_READ_PORT_6
endif
ifeq ($(scfg), rvv_backend_bringup)
	RTL_DEFINE = +define+TB_BRINGUP+TB_SUPPORT
	RTL_DEFINE += +define+ASSERT_ON
	RTLFILES = $(DESIGN_PATH)/rvv_backend.sv
endif

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# VCS Options
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFINES   = $(RTL_DEFINE) $(TB_DEFINE)
PLUS_ARGS ?= 
BUILD_OPTS =  
SIM_OPTS  =
UVM_TEST ?= $(test)
TB_TOP = rvv_backend_top
#Checking the VCS version
#VCS_VERSION = $(shell vcs -id > vcs_version ; grep "Compiler version" vcs_version | awk -F " " '{print $$5}')
#This variable contains all the UVM-1.0 supported VCS tool versions.
UVM10_SUPP_VCS_VERSNS = E-2011.03 
TIMESCALE = -override_timescale=1ns/1ps
UVM_VERBOSITY ?= UVM_LOW
SIM_TCL ?= $(TB_PATH)/dump_fsdb.tcl
# PARTCOMP = -partcomp -topcfg $(TB_PATH)/$(PROJECT_NAME)_topcfg.v
PARTCOMP =
timeout ?= "1000000000ns,no"
logdir ?= "outfiles"

ifdef seed
	SEED = +ntb_random_seed=$(seed)
else
	SEED = +ntb_random_seed_automatic
endif
ifdef seed
TESTNAME   = $(UVM_TEST)$(atn)"."$(seed)
else
TESTNAME   = $(UVM_TEST)$(atn)
endif
ifeq ($(dump),on)
 	DUMP = -ucli -i $(SIM_TCL)
else
	DUMP = 
endif
ifeq ($(coverage),on)
	COV = -cm cond+line+branch+tgl -cm_dir $(COV_PATH) -cm_name $(TESTNAME)
	DEFINES := $(filter-out +define+TB_SUPPORT, $(DEFINES))
else
	COV = 
endif
ifeq ($(debug),on)
	UVM_DEBUG_COMP =  -kdb -lca +UVM_VERDI_COMPWAVE
	UVM_DEBUG_SIM = +UVM_VERDI_TRACE="UVM_AWARE+RAL+HIRE+COMPWAVE" +UVM_TR_RECORD -gui=verdi
else 
	UVM_DEBUG_COMP = 
	UVM_DEBUG_SIM = 
endif
atn ?=
max_error ?= 1

ifdef VCS_HOME
 ifneq ($(VCS_VERSION),$(filter $(VCS_VERSION),$(UVM10_SUPP_VCS_VERSNS)))
  VCS_VERS_WARNING = 1
 endif  
 ifndef UVM_HOME
  UVM = -ntb_opts uvm 
 else
  UVM = -debug_pp +incdir+$(UVM_HOME)/src $(UVM_HOME)/src/uvm_pkg.sv ${UVM_HOME}/src/dpi/uvm_dpi.cc -CFLAGS -DVCS 
 endif
else
 ERR_STATUS = 1
endif
PLI_OPTS = -P ${NOVAS_HOME}/share/PLI/VCS/LINUX64/novas.tab ${NOVAS_HOME}/share/PLI/VCS/LINUX64/pli.a

ASSERT_OPTS = -assert global_finish_maxfail=1		\
							-assert set_error_action=display -assert set_error_action=count	\
							-assert set_warning_action=display	\
							-assert set_info_action=display	\
							-assert quiet+quiet1+nopostproc

ifeq ($(xprop_en), on)
VCOMP_XPROP_OPTS := -xprop=xmerge
VSIM_XPROP_OPTS  := -xprop=banner	
else
VCOMP_XPROP_OPTS := 
VSIM_XPROP_OPTS  := 
endif

BUILD_PATH = $(RVV_ROOT)/build/$(scfg)

SIM_PATH	 = $(RVV_ROOT)/$(logdir)/$(scfg)/$(TESTNAME)
COV_PATH   = $(RVV_ROOT)/$(logdir)/$(scfg)/

#Compile command
VCOMP = vcs -full64 -sverilog +define+SV	\
				+nospecify	\
				+vcs+lic+wait	\
				-deraceclockdata +notimingcheck	\
				-debug_access+all	\
				-assert enable_hier	\
				$(TIMESCALE)	\
				$(PLI_OPTS)	\
				$(UVM)	\
				$(COV)	\
				$(UVM_DEBUG_COMP)	\
				-Mupdate -Mdir=$(BUILD_PATH)/csrc	\
				$(PARTCOMP)	\
				$(VCOMP_XPROP_OPTS)	\
				-f $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst -top $(TB_TOP)	\
				-o $(BUILD_PATH)/simv	 


#Simulation command
VSIM  = $(BUILD_PATH)/simv	\
				+vcs+lic+wait  \
				$(ASSERT_OPTS)	\
				$(SEED)	\
				$(VSIM_XPROP_OPTS) \
				$(PLUS_ARGS)	\
				+UVM_TESTNAME=$(UVM_TEST) +UVM_VERBOSITY=$(UVM_VERBOSITY) \
				$(DUMP) $(UVM_DEBUG_SIM)	\
				+UVM_MAX_QUIT_COUNT=$(max_error),NO	\
				+UVM_TIMEOUT=$(timeout)	\
				$(COV)

RTLFILES := $(filter-out $(UNUSED),$(RTLFILES))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# CMDs
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
all default: vcs sim 

vcs: vlst mkbuilddir
	@cd $(BUILD_PATH); $(VCOMP) -l $(BUILD_PATH)/vcs.log 
	@echo "Build log: $(BUILD_PATH)/vcs.log"

sim_test:
	@cd $(SIM_PATH); $(VSIM) -l $(SIM_PATH)/test.log
	@echo "Test log: $(SIM_PATH)/test.log"

chk_test:
	@echo "checking test result......"
	@$(RVV_ROOT)/com/check_test.pl check $(UVM_TEST) $(SIM_PATH)/test.log 

cleanup_log:
	@echo "cleaning up test log......"
	@$(RVV_ROOT)/com/check_test.pl clean $(UVM_TEST) $(SIM_PATH)/tb_asm_dump.log

sim: mksimdir sim_test chk_test cleanup_log
	@echo "finised simulation......"

mkbuilddir:
	@echo "making build dir for scfg: $(scfg)"
	# @rm -rf $(BUILD_PATH)
	@mkdir -p $(BUILD_PATH)

mksimdir:
	@echo "creating test simulation dir for test: $(UVM_TEST)"
	@mkdir -p $(SIM_PATH)
	@cp $(scfg).vlst $(SIM_PATH)

list vlst:
	@echo "creating vlst for $(scfg)..."
	@rm -rf $(scfg).vlst
	@echo "$(RTL_INC)" > $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
	@echo "$(TB_INC)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
	@echo "$(DEFINES)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
	@echo "$(RTLFILES)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
	@echo "$(TBFILES)" >> $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst
	@perl -i -ane 's/\s+/\n/g; s/-(.)\n/-$$1 /g; s,//,/,g; print;' $(RVV_ROOT)/$(scfg).vlst


clean:
	rm -rf $(RVV_ROOT)/build/
	rm -rf $(RVV_ROOT)/outfiles/
	rm -rf *.vlst 

show:
	@echo "WORKSPACE: $(RVV_WORKSPACE)"
	@echo "RTL_DEFINE: $(RTL_DEFINE)"
	@echo "scfg: $(scfg)"
	@echo "SIM_PATH: $(SIM_PATH)"

help:
	@echo "***************************************************************"
	@echo "   Makefile Help for $(PROJECT_NAME) :                         "
	@echo "***************************************************************"
	@echo "  Usage:                                                       "
	@echo "  ------                                                       "
	@echo "  make       Compile and Run the testcase                      "
	@echo "                                                               "
	@echo "  Available targets: all/vcs/sim/help/clean                    "
	@echo "    make help                  [To see the Help]               "
	@echo "  Building options:                                            "
	@echo "    make scfg=xxx vcs    [compile the design]                  "
	@echo "      coverage=on        [enable coverage option]              "
	@echo "  Simulation options:                                          "
	@echo "    make scfg=xxx sim test=xxx [Run simulation]                "
	@echo "      PLUS_ARGS=xxx     [set plusargs]                         "
	@echo "      UVM_VERBOSITY=xxx [set UVM message verbosity level]      "
	@echo "      debug=on          [enable UVM debug options]             "
	@echo "      dump=on           [enable fsdb dump]                     "
	@echo "      coverage=on       [coverage enable]                      "
	@echo "      max_error=xx      [max UVM_ERROR to quit, default 10]    "
	@echo "  Example:                                                     "
	@echo "    sve/rvv_fifo_tb/Makefile scfg=$(scfg) vcs coverage=on      "
	@echo "    sve/rvv_fifo_tb/Makefile scfg=$(scfg) sim UVM_TEST=$(UVM_TEST) UVM_VERBOSITY=UVM_HIGH dump=on coverage=on"
	@echo "***************************************************************"

file.content:
# Disable bzlmod and enable workspace while we migrate
common --noenable_bzlmod --enable_workspace

# Bazel 8 default-flipped --incompatible_disallow_empty_glob. Several BUILD
# files (notably third_party/* with mixed .v/.sv source trees) rely on the
# legacy permissive behavior. Restore it for now; clean up per-glob in a
# follow-up.
common --noincompatible_disallow_empty_glob

build --action_env=BAZEL_CXXOPTS="-std=c++17"
build --cxxopt='-std=c++17'
build --conlyopt='-std=gnu11'

# Disable the low signal-to-noise ratio warnings
build --copt=-Wno-unused-function

# Disable tool build warnings. The tools are fetched/generated from OSS repos
build --host_copt=-Wno-unused-variable
build --host_copt=-Wno-unused-value
build --host_copt=-Wno-uninitialized
build --host_copt=-Wno-sign-compare
build --host_copt=-O3

# Disable Java obsolete options and bad path warnings
build --javacopt="-nowarn"
build --host_javacopt="-nowarn"


# This lets us generate key/value pairs for the workspace which can be used to
# generate the version information.

build --workspace_status_command=utils/get_workspace_status.sh

build --experimental_cc_shared_library
run --java_runtime_version=remotejdk_11
test --java_runtime_version=remotejdk_11

build --repo_env BAZEL_JVM_FETCH_SOURCES=false
run --repo_env BAZEL_JVM_FETCH_SOURCES=false
test --repo_env BAZEL_JVM_FETCH_SOURCES=false

# Skip VCS by default as most workstations will not have licenses.
build --build_tag_filters="-vcs,-synthesis,-power"
build --action_env=VCS_HOME
build --host_action_env=VCS_HOME
build --action_env=VC_STATIC_HOME
build --host_action_env=VC_STATIC_HOME
build --action_env=VERDI_HOME
build --host_action_env=VERDI_HOME
build --action_env=LM_LICENSE_FILE
build --host_action_env=LM_LICENSE_FILE
build --action_env=LICENSE_SERVER_VCSSIM
build --host_action_env=LICENSE_SERVER_VCSSIM
build --action_env=XILINXD_LICENSE_FILE
build --host_action_env=XILINXD_LICENSE_FILE
test --build_tag_filters="-vcs,-synthesis,-power"
test --test_tag_filters="-vcs,-synthesis,-power"
test --action_env=VCS_HOME
test --host_action_env=VCS_HOME
test --action_env=VC_STATIC_HOME
test --host_action_env=VC_STATIC_HOME
test --action_env=VERDI_HOME
test --host_action_env=VERDI_HOME
test --action_env=LM_LICENSE_FILE
test --host_action_env=LM_LICENSE_FILE
test --action_env=LICENSE_SERVER_VCSSIM
test --host_action_env=LICENSE_SERVER_VCSSIM
test --action_env=XILINXD_LICENSE_FILE
test --host_action_env=XILINXD_LICENSE_FILE
run --action_env=VCS_HOME
run --host_action_env=VCS_HOME
run --action_env=VC_STATIC_HOME
run --host_action_env=VC_STATIC_HOME
run --action_env=VERDI_HOME
run --host_action_env=VERDI_HOME
run --action_env=LM_LICENSE_FILE
run --host_action_env=LM_LICENSE_FILE
run --action_env=LICENSE_SERVER_VCSSIM
run --host_action_env=LICENSE_SERVER_VCSSIM
run --action_env=XILINXD_LICENSE_FILE
run --host_action_env=XILINXD_LICENSE_FILE


# Add config to enable VCS targets.
build:vcs --build_tag_filters="vcs"
test:vcs --build_tag_filters="vcs"
test:vcs --test_tag_filters="vcs"
run:vcs --build_tag_filters="vcs"
run:vcs --test_tag_filters="vcs"

# Add config to enable synthesis targets.
build:synthesis --build_tag_filters="synthesis"
test:synthesis --build_tag_filters="synthesis"
test:synthesis --test_tag_filters="synthesis"
run:synthesis --build_tag_filters="synthesis"
run:synthesis --test_tag_filters="synthesis"

# Add config to enable power targets.
build:power --build_tag_filters="power"
test:power --build_tag_filters="power"
test:power --test_tag_filters="power"
run:power --build_tag_filters="power"
run:power --test_tag_filters="power"

# Set preprocessor defines for tflite-micro.
build --copt=-DTF_LITE_USE_GLOBAL_CMATH_FUNCTIONS
build --copt=-DTF_LITE_USE_GLOBAL_MIN
build --copt=-DTF_LITE_USE_GLOBAL_MAX
build --copt=-DTF_LITE_MCU_DEBUG_LOG
build:opt --copt=-DTF_LITE_STRIP_ERROR_STRINGS


# Selecting coralnpu platform with custom toolchain.
build:coralnpu_v2 --platforms=//platforms:coralnpu_v2

build --incompatible_enable_cc_toolchain_resolution
build --use_top_level_targets_for_symlinks=false

# Use GNU BFD linker (compatible with GCC 15 .sframe)
build --host_linkopt=-fuse-ld=bfd
build --linkopt=-fuse-ld=bfd

# Disable LLD-specific "start-lib" optimization (incompatible with BFD)
build --host_features=-supports_start_end_lib
build --features=-supports_start_end_lib

# Only show warnings/errors from our own code
build --output_filter="^//(?!(third_party)(/|:|$))"

20	module coralnpu_tb_top;
21	
22	  import uvm_pkg::*;
23	  `include "uvm_macros.svh"

56	  ) master_axi_if ( .clk(clk), .resetn(resetn) );
57

60	    .DWIDTH(AXI_DATA_WIDTH),
61	    .IDWIDTH(AXI_ID_WIDTH)
62	  ) slave_axi_if ( .clk(clk), .resetn(resetn) );

88	    .io_axi_slave_write_addr_bits_cache(master_axi_if.awcache),
89	    .io_axi_slave_write_addr_bits_qos  (master_axi_if.awqos),

100	    .io_axi_slave_write_resp_bits_id   (master_axi_if.bid),
101	    .io_axi_slave_write_resp_bits_resp (master_axi_if.bresp),
102	
103	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_valid      (master_axi_if.arvalid),
104	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_ready      (master_axi_if.arready),
105	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_addr  (master_axi_if.araddr),
106	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_prot  (master_axi_if.arprot),
107	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_id    (master_axi_if.arid),
108	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_len   (master_axi_if.arlen),
109	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_size  (master_axi_if.arsize),
110	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_burst (master_axi_if.arburst),
111	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_lock  (master_axi_if.arlock),
112	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_cache (master_axi_if.arcache),
113	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_qos   (master_axi_if.arqos),
114	    .io_axi_slave_read_addr_bits_region(master_axi_if.arregion),
115	
116	    .io_axi_slave_read_data_valid      (master_axi_if.rvalid),
117	    .io_axi_slave_read_data_ready      (master_axi_if.rready),
118	    .io_axi_slave_read_data_bits_data  (master_axi_if.rdata),
119	    .io_axi_slave_read_data_bits_id    (master_axi_if.rid),
120	    .io_axi_slave_read_data_bits_resp  (master_axi_if.rresp),
121	    .io_axi_slave_read_data_bits_last  (master_axi_if.rlast),
122

124	    // AXI Master Port (Drives TB Slave)
125	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_valid   (slave_axi_if.awvalid),
126	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_ready   (slave_axi_if.awready),
127	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_addr(slave_axi_if.awaddr),
128	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_prot(slave_axi_if.awprot),
129	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_id (slave_axi_if.awid),
130	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_len(slave_axi_if.awlen),
131	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_size(slave_axi_if.awsize),
132	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_burst(slave_axi_if.awburst),
133	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_lock(slave_axi_if.awlock),
134	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_cache(slave_axi_if.awcache),
135	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_qos(slave_axi_if.awqos),
136	    .io_axi_master_write_addr_bits_region(slave_axi_if.awregion),
137	
138	    .io_axi_master_write_data_valid   (slave_axi_if.wvalid),
139	    .io_axi_master_write_data_ready   (slave_axi_if.wready),
140	    .io_axi_master_write_data_bits_data(slave_axi_if.wdata),
141	    .io_axi_master_write_data_bits_last(slave_axi_if.wlast),
142	    .io_axi_master_write_data_bits_strb(slave_axi_if.wstrb),
143	
144	    .io_axi_master_write_resp_valid   (slave_axi_if.bvalid),
145	    .io_axi_master_write_resp_ready   (slave_axi_if.bready),
146	    .io_axi_master_write_resp_bits_id (slave_axi_if.bid),
147	    .io_axi_master_write_resp_bits_resp(slave_axi_if.bresp),
148	
149	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_valid    (slave_axi_if.arvalid),
150	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_ready    (slave_axi_if.arready),
151	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_addr(slave_axi_if.araddr),
152	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_prot(slave_axi_if.arprot),
153	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_id  (slave_axi_if.arid),
154	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_len (slave_axi_if.arlen),
155	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_size(slave_axi_if.arsize),
156	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_burst(slave_axi_if.arburst),
157	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_lock (slave_axi_if.arlock),
158	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_cache(slave_axi_if.arcache),
159	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_qos  (slave_axi_if.arqos),
160	    .io_axi_master_read_addr_bits_region(slave_axi_if.arregion),
161	
162	    .io_axi_master_read_data_valid    (slave_axi_if.rvalid),
163	    .io_axi_master_read_data_ready    (slave_axi_if.rready),
164	    .io_axi_master_read_data_bits_data(slave_axi_if.rdata),
165	    .io_axi_master_read_data_bits_id  (slave_axi_if.rid),
166	    .io_axi_master_read_data_bits_resp(slave_axi_if.rresp),
167	    .io_axi_master_read_data_bits_last(slave_axi_if.rlast),
168	
169	    // IRQ, Control, and Status Signals
170	    .io_irq(irq_if.irq),
171	    .io_te(irq_if.te),
172	    .io_halted(irq_if.halted),
173	    .io_fault(irq_if.fault),
174	    .io_wfi(irq_if.wfi),
175	
176	    // TODO: Connect Debug and Logging ports if needed by TB
177	    .io_debug_en(),
178	    .io_debug_addr_0(),
179	    .io_debug_addr_1(),
180	    .io_debug_addr_2(),
181	    .io_debug_addr_3(),
182	    .io_debug_inst_0(),

184	    .io_debug_inst_2(),

187	  );

189	
190	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
191	  // Clock Generation
192	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
193	  initial begin
194	    clk = 0;
195	    forever #(CLK_PERIOD/2) clk = ~clk;
196	  end
197	
198	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
199	  // Reset Generation and Initial IRQ/TE Driving
200	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
201	  initial begin
202	    uvm_event pulse_reset_event;
203	    pulse_reset_event = new("pulse_reset_event");
204	    uvm_config_db#(uvm_event)::set(null, "*", "pulse_reset_event", pulse_reset_event);
205	
206	    // Initialize signals before reset
207	    irq_if.irq = 1'b0;
208	    irq_if.te  = 1'b0;
209	    resetn = 1'b0; // Start in reset
210	
211	    forever begin
212	      // Reset Sequence
213	      resetn = 1'b0; // Assert reset
214	      `uvm_info("TB_TOP", "Reset Asserted", UVM_LOW)
215	      repeat (5) @(posedge clk);
216	      resetn = 1'b1; // Deassert reset
217	      `uvm_info("TB_TOP", "Reset Deasserted", UVM_LOW)
218	      pulse_reset_event.wait_trigger();
219	    end
220	  end
221	
222	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
223	  // Waveform Dumping
224	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
225	  `ifdef DUMP_WAVES_FSDB
226	  initial begin
227	    $fsdbDumpfile($sformatf("./sim_work/waves/%s.fsdb", "coralnpu_base_test"));
228	    $fsdbDumpvars(0, coralnpu_tb_top, "+mda");
229	    `uvm_info("TB_TOP",
230	              $sformatf("FSDB Waveform Dumping Enabled to: %s",
231	              $sformatf("./sim_work/waves/%s.fsdb", "coralnpu_base_test")),
232	              UVM_LOW);
233	  end
234	  `endif
235	  `ifdef DUMP_WAVES_VCD
236	  initial begin
237	    $dumpfile($sformatf("./sim_work/waves/%s.vcd", "coralnpu_base_test"));
238	    $dumpvars(0, coralnpu_tb_top, "+mda");
239	    `uvm_info("TB_TOP",
240	              $sformatf("VCD Waveform Dumping Enabled to: %s",
241	              $sformatf("./sim_work/waves/%s.vcd", "coralnpu_base_test")),
242	              UVM_LOW);
243	  end
244	  `endif
245	
246	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
247	  // ELF Memory Loading and `tohost` Monitor
248	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
249	  initial begin
250	    string test_elf;
251	    string tohost_addr_str;
252	    logic [31:0] tohost_addr;
253	    uvm_event tohost_written_event;
254	    uvm_event test_start_event;
255	
256	    tohost_written_event = new("tohost_written_event");
257	    uvm_config_db#(uvm_event)::set(null, "*",
258	                                   "tohost_written_event",
259	                                   tohost_written_event);
260	
261	    test_start_event = new("test_start_event");
262	    uvm_config_db#(uvm_event)::set(null, "*",
263	                                   "test_start_event",
264	                                   test_start_event);
265	
266	    // Get the tohost address from the plusargs
267	    if ($value$plusargs("TOHOST_ADDR=%s", tohost_addr_str)) begin
268	      if ($sscanf(tohost_addr_str, "'h%h", tohost_addr) != 1 &&
269	          $sscanf(tohost_addr_str, "0x%h", tohost_addr) != 1 &&
270	          $sscanf(tohost_addr_str, "%h", tohost_addr) != 1) begin
271	        `uvm_fatal("TB_TOP", $sformatf("Invalid +TOHOST_ADDR format: %s", tohost_addr_str))
272	      end
273	    end
274	
275	    // Fork a process that waits for start, then monitors for write
276	    fork
277	      forever begin
278	        test_start_event.wait_trigger();
279	
280	        // Dynamic tohost update support
281	        void'(uvm_config_db#(logic [31:0])::get(null, "*", "tohost_addr", tohost_addr));
282	
283	        forever begin
284	          @(posedge clk);
285	          // Check internal data bus (dbus)
286	          if (u_dut.core.io_dbus_valid && u_dut.core.io_dbus_write &&
287	              u_dut.core.io_dbus_addr == tohost_addr) begin
288	            if (u_dut.core.io_dbus_wdata[0] == 1'b1) begin
289	              `uvm_info("TB_TOP_MONITOR", "tohost write detected on DBUS.", UVM_LOW)
290	              uvm_config_db#(logic [127:0])::set(null, "*",
291	                  "final_tohost_data", u_dut.core.io_dbus_wdata);
292	              tohost_written_event.trigger();
293	              break; // Stop monitoring for this test
294	            end
295	          end
296	
297	          // Check external bus (ebus)
298	          if (u_dut.core.io_ebus_dbus_valid && u_dut.core.io_ebus_dbus_ready &&
299	              u_dut.core.io_ebus_dbus_write && u_dut.core.io_ebus_dbus_addr == tohost_addr) begin
300	            if (u_dut.core.io_ebus_dbus_wdata[0] == 1'b1) begin
301	              `uvm_info("TB_TOP_MONITOR", "tohost write detected on EBUS.", UVM_LOW)
302	              uvm_config_db#(logic [127:0])::set(null, "*",
303	                  "final_tohost_data", u_dut.core.io_ebus_dbus_wdata);
304	              tohost_written_event.trigger();
305	              break; // Stop monitoring for this test
306	            end
307	          end
308	        end
309	      end
310	    join_none
311	  end
312	
313	
314	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
315	  // UVM Test Execution
316	  //--------------------------------------------------------------------------
317	  initial begin
318	    // Assign virtual interface handle procedurally
319	    rvvi_vif = u_dut.core.score.rvvi.rvviTraceBlackBox.rvvi;
320	
321	    // Set virtual interfaces in the config_db for the agents/test
322	    uvm_config_db#(virtual coralnpu_axi_master_if.TB_MASTER_DRIVER)::set(null,
323	        "*.env.m_master_agent*", "vif", master_axi_if);
324	    uvm_config_db#(virtual coralnpu_axi_slave_if.TB_SLAVE_MODEL)::set(null,
325	        "*.env.m_slave_agent*", "vif", slave_axi_if);
326	    uvm_config_db#(virtual coralnpu_irq_if.TB_IRQ_DRIVER)::set(null,
327	        "*.env.m_irq_agent*", "vif", irq_if);
328	    uvm_config_db#(virtual coralnpu_irq_if.DUT_IRQ_PORT)::set(null,
329	        "*", "irq_vif", irq_if);
330	
331	    uvm_config_db#(virtual rvviTrace #(.ILEN(32), .XLEN(32), .FLEN(32),
332	        .VLEN(128), .NHART(1), .RETIRE(8)))::set(null,
333	        "*.env.m_cosim_checker*", "rvvi_vif", rvvi_vif);
334	    uvm_config_db#(virtual rvviTrace #(.ILEN(32), .XLEN(32), .FLEN(32),
335	        .VLEN(128), .NHART(1), .RETIRE(8)))::set(null,
336	        "*.env.m_rvvi_agent*", "rvvi_vif", rvvi_vif);
337	
338	    uvm_config_db#(time)::set(null, "*", "clk_period", CLK_PERIOD);
339	
340	    // Run the test
341	    run_test();
342	  end
343	
344	endmodule : coralnpu_tb_top
345
